nasb.text: So Aaron stretched out his hand over the waters of Egypt, and the frogs came up and covered the land of Egypt.

esv.text: So Aaron stretched out his hand over the waters of Egypt, and the frogs came up and covered the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 亞倫把手一伸在埃及的眾水之上，青蛙就上來了，並且遮蓋了埃及地。

ccb.text: 亚伦伸杖，青蛙就遍布了埃及全境。
